titles.it: Sviluppatore Web Full Stack (Backend e Frontend)
titles.en: Sviluppatore Web Full Stack (Backend e Frontend)
titles.de: Web Full Stack Entwickler/in (Backend und Frontend)
titles.fr: Developpeur Web Full Stack (Backend et Frontend)

descriptions.it: GOLINE SA cerca uno Sviluppatore Web Full Stack (backend e frontend) per la sede di Stabio, in Canton Ticino. Il ruolo e pensato per profili esperti che vogliono lavorare su applicazioni web, integrazioni e soluzioni digitali in un contesto tecnico molto operativo. ## Responsabilita principali - Sviluppare e mantenere applicazioni web dinamiche lato frontend e backend. - Realizzare siti, web application e API con attenzione a performance e sicurezza. - Tradurre mockup e layout in implementazioni HTML e CSS di qualita. - Mantenere e ottimizzare soluzioni esistenti basate su Laravel, PHP e WordPress. - Lavorare con REST API, SOAP e architetture database come MS SQL Server, MySQL e MariaDB. - Collaborare con il team usando sistemi di versionamento come Git, SVN e TFS. ## Competenze richieste - Almeno 5 anni di esperienza con JavaScript e PHP. - Esperienza con framework MVC e CMS. - Conoscenza di Bootstrap e di almeno uno tra Angular, React o Vue.js. - Esperienza con strumenti di versionamento del codice per almeno 2 anni. - Buona conoscenza degli strumenti Adobe come Photoshop, Illustrator o XD. - Ottima comprensione di architetture web e integrazioni REST e SOAP. - Italiano fluente ed inglese almeno livello B1. ## Competenze gradite - Conoscenza di TypeScript, Angular e Node.js. - Esperienza con test software e relativi framework. - Gestione di server hosting in ambienti Linux. - Nozioni di SEO e social networking. ## Requisiti del candidato - Padronanza nativa o professionale completa della lingua italiana. - Cittadinanza svizzera oppure UE/EFTA con diritto a vivere e lavorare in Svizzera. ## Contesto di lavoro - Sede di lavoro: Stabio, Canton Ticino, Svizzera. - Contratto a tempo indeterminato. - Retribuzione commisurata all esperienza e definita in fase di colloquio. ## Iter di selezione - Prima fase con questionario tecnico per valutare competenze e seniority. - Seconda fase con colloquio insieme al team leader per i profili selezionati. ## Perche candidarsi - Possibilita di crescita professionale e innovazione continua. - Esposizione a tecnologie moderne e progetti web concreti. - Ambiente di lavoro dinamico e collaborativo. Candidatura: https://www.goline.ch/self-application/
descriptions.en: Web Full Stack Developer (Backend & Frontend) at GOLINE SA in Stabio, Ticino. GOLINE SA is seeking talented Full Stack Developers to work on both frontend and backend development. This role offers opportunities to grow, innovate, and contribute to cutting-edge web applications. ## Key Responsibilities - Create websites, web applications, and APIs. - Develop mockups and implement in HTML/CSS. - Maintain and optimize existing Laravel (PHP) and WordPress solutions. - Work with REST/SOAP APIs and database architectures (MS SQL Server/MySQL/MariaDB). - Collaborate with team members using Git/SVN/TFS version control. - Participate in code documentation and development best practices. ## Required Skills and Experience - 5+ years of experience in JavaScript and PHP. - Experience with MVC frameworks and CMS. - Knowledge of Bootstrap and at least one of Angular, React, or Vue.js. - 2+ years with versioning software (Git/SVN/TFS). - Experience with Adobe tools (Photoshop, Illustrator, XD). - Strong understanding of web architectures and REST/SOAP APIs. - English (minimum B1) and fluent Italian (essential). ## Preferred Skills - Knowledge of TypeScript, Angular/NodeJS. - Experience with software testing and related frameworks. - Hosting server management in Linux environments. - SEO and social networking knowledge. ## Candidate Requirements - Native or full professional proficiency in Italian. - Swiss or EU/EFTA citizenship. (Live and work in Switzerland) ## Work Environment - Location: Stabio, Canton of Ticino, Switzerland. - Contract: Indefinite term. - Salary: Commensurate with experience (to be discussed during the interview). ## Interview Process - First phase: Technical questionnaire to assess skills and competencies. - Successful candidates will advance to an interview with the team leader. ## Why Join GOLINE SA - Opportunities for career growth and innovation. - Exposure to modern technologies and frameworks. - Chance to work in a dynamic, collaborative environment. - Be part of shaping digital experiences and solutions. Apply here: https://www.goline.ch/self-application/
descriptions.de: GOLINE SA sucht eine erfahrene Web-Full-Stack-Entwicklerin oder einen erfahrenen Web-Full-Stack-Entwickler fuer den Standort Stabio im Tessin. Die Rolle verbindet Backend, Frontend, Integrationen und operative Web-Projekte in einem technisch anspruchsvollen Umfeld. ## Hauptaufgaben - Dynamische Webanwendungen im Frontend und Backend entwickeln und pflegen. - Websites, Webanwendungen und APIs erstellen. - Mockups in saubere HTML- und CSS-Implementierungen umsetzen. - Bestehende Laravel-, PHP- und WordPress-Loesungen pflegen und optimieren. - Mit REST-, SOAP- und Datenbankarchitekturen wie MS SQL Server, MySQL und MariaDB arbeiten. - Eng mit dem Team ueber Git, SVN oder TFS zusammenarbeiten. ## Erforderliche Kenntnisse - Mindestens 5 Jahre Erfahrung mit JavaScript und PHP. - Praxis mit MVC-Frameworks und CMS. - Kenntnisse in Bootstrap und mindestens einem der Frameworks Angular, React oder Vue.js. - Mindestens 2 Jahre Erfahrung mit Versionsverwaltung. - Sicherer Umgang mit Adobe-Tools wie Photoshop, Illustrator oder XD. - Sehr gutes Verstaendnis von Webarchitekturen sowie REST- und SOAP-Schnittstellen. - Fliessendes Italienisch und Englisch mindestens auf Niveau B1. ## Von Vorteil - Kenntnisse in TypeScript, Angular und Node.js. - Erfahrung mit Softwaretests und Testframeworks. - Kenntnisse im Hosting- und Servermanagement unter Linux. - Grundwissen in SEO und Social Media. ## Rahmenbedingungen - Arbeitsort: Stabio, Tessin, Schweiz. - Unbefristeter Vertrag. - Gehalt entsprechend Erfahrung, Besprechung im Interview. ## Bewerbungsprozess - Erste Phase mit technischem Fragebogen. - Anschliessend Gespraech mit dem Team Lead fuer passende Kandidatinnen und Kandidaten. Bewerbung: https://www.goline.ch/self-application/
descriptions.fr: GOLINE SA recherche un ou une Developpeur Web Full Stack experimente(e) pour son site de Stabio, au Tessin. Le poste couvre le frontend, le backend, les integrations et l evolution continue d applications web dans un environnement technique concret. ## Responsabilites principales - Developper et maintenir des applications web dynamiques en frontend et backend. - Creer des sites web, des applications web et des API. - Transformer des maquettes en implementations HTML et CSS solides. - Maintenir et optimiser des solutions Laravel, PHP et WordPress existantes. - Travailler avec des API REST, SOAP et des bases de donnees comme MS SQL Server, MySQL et MariaDB. - Collaborer avec l equipe via Git, SVN ou TFS. ## Competences requises - Au moins 5 ans d experience en JavaScript et PHP. - Experience avec des frameworks MVC et des CMS. - Connaissance de Bootstrap et d au moins un framework parmi Angular, React ou Vue.js. - Au moins 2 ans d experience avec les outils de versioning. - Bonne maitrise des outils Adobe comme Photoshop, Illustrator ou XD. - Solide comprehension des architectures web et des integrations REST et SOAP. - Italien courant et anglais minimum niveau B1. ## Competences appreciees - Connaissance de TypeScript, Angular et Node.js. - Experience en tests logiciels et frameworks associes. - Gestion de serveurs et d environnements Linux. - Notions de SEO et de reseaux sociaux. ## Cadre de travail - Lieu de travail: Stabio, Tessin, Suisse. - Contrat a duree indeterminee. - Salaire selon experience, a definir pendant le processus de recrutement. ## Processus de recrutement - Premiere etape avec questionnaire technique. - Entretien avec le team leader pour les profils retenus. Candidature: https://www.goline.ch/self-application/
